contract_claim: transport.onmessage is patched AFTER client.connect() completes (L341). Any inbound messages processed during the connect handshake will NOT be captured in the raw log file or console, whereas the intent (logging all messages) implies all traffic should be captured. The send patch is applied before connect so outbound messages during connect are logged.
